name: Red Riding Dress
description: Notes Using your ability will change your skin to the Lil Red skin for 30 seconds, which will reset to the actual skin you have equipped after 30 seconds (with a 30 second cooldown after), or every time you change zones.
effects: Halloween Costume: On ability use, dress up as Lil Red Mystic for 60 seconds! Secret Power: On ability use, consume 1/4th of your candy-filled meter to activate a secret power! Basket Surprise: Toss a bomb for 2400-2600 armor piercing damage within 3 tiles. Secret Power Cooldown: 180 seconds
